StyledText.Data: List for <<TF PI Text 1::Display text>>, Block: <<FAT Block @ Page item::Name>>, Type of list: <<List template @ Page item::Name>>

LayoutObject.name: Title List

Calculation.Text: FAT ModifierValue @ Title::Modifier id = FAT Title::<Field Missing>

LayoutObject.name: T1

Calculation.Text: FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage Or (List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields = 1) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T1 TRANS

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage Or (List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields = 1) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T1 Wide

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields >1 Or FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T1 TRANS Wide

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields > 1 Or Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T2 Wide

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 2 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields =3 Or FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T2 TRANS Wide

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 2 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields = 3 Or Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T2

Calculation.Text: FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage Or (List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 2 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields = 2) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T2 TRANS

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage Or (List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 2 Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields = 2) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T3

Calculation.Text: FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 3 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T3 TRANS

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage Or List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 3 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Number of list items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT List item @ Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")

SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::Number of list items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT List item @ Page item::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "String" And List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Number" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "String" And FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Number" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Boolean" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Boolean" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "IO" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "IO" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Color" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Color" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Page item" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Link" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And (FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Link" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0)
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media LI PI 1::Container file extension )
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 1
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 1
SetProperty ( "list_item_id" ; FAT List item @ Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item List" )

StyledText.Data: Number of items in list: <<Number of list items>>
Example what the building block could look like

ScriptReference.name: Convert Page item List to List

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate @ Page item::List template id ) Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::List enabled

StyledText.Data: Convert this page item list to title list

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate @ Page item::List template id ) Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item::List enabled

ScriptReference.name: Init List item Rich Text Editor
